overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rural western frontier settlement during golden hour. The character passes horse-drawn wagons and wooden frontier buildings while traveling along a dirt path through grassy fields with autumn foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier settlement with wooden houses and covered wagons

events.description: passing a stationary horse-drawn covered wagon on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the settlement, passing wooden frontier buildings

notable_agents.action: stationary covered wagon with harnessed horses, parked by the roadside

entered.detail: two-story wooden frontier house with porch and chimney
canvas-covered horse-drawn wagon with large wooden wheels
small white wooden fence enclosing a yard area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a western frontier settlement with wooden houses and a covered wagon parked by the dirt path. The character walks forward through warm golden hour light, passing the stationary wagon on the right while wooden buildings line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with large oak trees and autumn foliage

events.description: leaving the settlement behind and entering open countryside with scattered large trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path through grassy fields with autumn trees

notable_agents.action: stationary open wagon with horses, parked on the grass beside the path

entered.detail: massive oak tree with spreading branches creating dappled shade over the path
low stone wall running along the left side of the grassy field
cluster of trees with orange and red autumn foliage against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to open countryside as the settlement buildings fall behind. The path winds through tall grass and past massive oak trees with autumn-colored leaves. A second stationary wagon sits on the left side of the path as the character continues walking through the sun-dappled landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural homestead with red house and outbuildings

events.description: approaching a rural homestead with a distinctive red wooden house and farm buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the red house and farm buildings, approaching a campfire area

notable_agents.action: person standing near a campfire with smoke rising, possibly tending the fire

entered.detail: single-story red wooden house with porch, white trim, and weathered siding
weathered wooden shed or barn structure with sloped roof
rustic wooden fence enclosing the homestead property
large boulder sitting in the grass near the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a rural homestead dominated by a distinctive red wooden house on the right. The character walks past a wooden shed on the left where smoke rises from a campfire and a person stands nearby. The path leads toward the red house surrounded by rustic fencing and scattered farm debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a frontier settlement and transitions through the open countryside toward a rural homestead. It begins by following the character along a dirt path lined with wooden houses, passing a covered wagon bathed in warm golden hour light. As the settlement buildings fall behind, the scene opens into a sun-dappled landscape where the path winds through tall grass and beneath massive oak trees with autumn-colored leaves, passing another stationary wagon. The camera then shifts toward a rustic farmstead, moving past a wooden shed with a rising campfire and a standing figure before finally approaching a distinctive red wooden house surrounded by fencing and scattered debris.
